content: pg_dump -Fc produces custom-format compressed archive suitable for pg_restore. --no-owner omits ALTER OWNER statements (portable across different users). --no-acl omits GRANT/REVOKE. PGPASSWORD env var enables non-interactive auth via libpq. docker compose exec -T disables TTY allocation — without -T Docker allocates a pseudo-TTY which corrupts binary streams redirected to files. The -T flag is required when piping stdout to a host file. PGPASSWORD must be set in the environment prefix or exported before the docker compose exec call.
